reach_why: Extends familiar fallibilist critiques of confidence and search, but does not open fundamentally new explanatory territory.
novelty_why: Non-obviously links combinatorial search critiques, rhetorical overconfidence, and measurement-invention limits in one framework.
falsifiable_why: Testable by comparing verbal-confidence, explanatory success, and performance on tasks requiring new measurements or protocols.
explanation: Fluent explanatory confidence can outpace real discovery, especially when progress requires new ways to probe the world.
